Memastikan proses System/Application Development
Memastikan proses System/Application Deployment
Memastikan kegiatan Go Live Execution

Operational Support di Aktivitas BPD Procurement / SS Project

Tingkat Pendidikan : S1
Jurusan : Teknik Industri, Sistem Informasi, Teknik Informatika
Business process mapping (flowchart, BPMN)
Analytical thinking
Menguasasi MS Excel / data analysis
Communication (karena dealing dengan vendor & internal)
Basic procurement knowledge
Problem solving
